case_title: SHU XIA CHEN VS. PETER WONG

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, SHU XIA , AN INDIVIDUAL AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, PETER , AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
